name: 文件管理器
description: 文件管理器模块，支持目录遍历、文件增删改查、搜索等操作
description_en: File manager with directory browsing, file CRUD, search and more

permissions.name: android.permission.MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
permissions.desc: 用于访问手机存储中的文件和目录，支持浏览、搜索、复制、移动和删除文件
permissions.desc_en: Access files and directories on device storage for browsing, searching, copying, moving and deleting

apis.name: deleteFile
paramDesc: 单个文件路径(字符串)或多个文件路径(JSON数组)
paramDesc_en: Single file path (string) or array of file paths (JSON array)

apis.name: copyFile
paramDesc: 单个文件路径(字符串)或多个文件路径(JSON数组)
目标目录路径或完整目标路径
paramDesc_en: Single file path (string) or multiple file paths (JSON array)
Target directory or full destination path

apis.name: moveFile
paramDesc: 单个文件路径(字符串)或多个文件路径(JSON数组)。注意：每个路径必须是单独的文件路径，不要传入目录
目标目录路径。注意：dst应该是目标目录如/sdcard/图片/，不要拼接源路径
paramDesc_en: Single file path (string) or array of file paths (JSON array). Each must be a single file, not a directory
Target directory path. Note: dst should be a directory like /sdcard/pics/, do NOT append source path

apis.name: getFileInfo
apis.desc: 获取文件信息(大小、修改时间等)
apis.desc_en: Get file info (size, modified time, etc.)

apis.name: searchFiles
apis.desc: 搜索文件或目录(支持通配符和类型过滤)
paramDesc: 结果类型过滤: file(仅文件,默认)、dir(仅目录)、all(全部)。移动/复制前请用file过滤
paramDesc_en: Result type filter: file (files only, default), dir (directories only), all (both). Use file before move/copy
